items.title: free-claude-code
items.description: Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or via discord like openclaw
items.description_zh: 在终端、VSCode 扩展中或通过 openclaw 等 Discord 免费使用 claude-code

items.title: ml-intern
items.description: 🤗 ml-intern: an open-source ML engineer that reads papers, trains models, and ships ML models
items.description_zh: 🤗 ml-intern：开源 ML 工程师，负责阅读论文、训练模型和发布 ML 模型

items.title: osv-scanner
items.description: Vulnerability scanner written in Go which uses the data provided by https://osv.dev
items.description_zh: 用 Go 编写的漏洞扫描器，使用 https://osv.dev 提供的数据

items.title: hackingtool
items.description: ALL IN ONE Hacking Tool For Hackers
items.description_zh: 黑客的多合一黑客工具

items.title: claude-context
items.description: Code search MCP for Claude Code. Make entire codebase the context for any coding agent.
items.description_zh: 代码搜索 MCP 以获得克劳德代码。使整个代码库成为任何编码代理的上下文。

items.title: OpenMetadata
items.description: OpenMetadata is a unified metadata platform for data discovery, data observability, and data governance powered by a central metadata repository, in-depth column level lineage, and seamless team collaboration.
items.description_zh: OpenMetadata 是一个统一的元数据平台，用于数据发现、数据可观察性和数据治理，由中央元数据存储库、深入的列级沿袭和无缝团队协作提供支持。

items.title: posthog
items.description: 🦔 PostHog is an all-in-one developer platform for building successful products. We offer product analytics, web analytics, session replay, error tracking, feature flags, experimentation, surveys, data warehouse, a CDP, and an AI product assistant to help debug your code, ship features faster, and keep all your usage and customer data in one stack.
items.description_zh: 🦔 PostHog 是一个用于构建成功产品的一体化开发者平台。我们提供产品分析、网络分析、会话重播、错误跟踪、功能标记、实验、调查、数据仓库、CDP 和 AI 产品助手，以帮助调试您的代码、更快地发布功能，并将您的所有使用情况和客户数据保存在一个堆栈中。

items.title: vaultwarden
items.description: Unofficial Bitwarden compatible server written in Rust, formerly known as bitwarden_rs
items.description_zh: 用 Rust 编写的非官方 Bitwarden 兼容服务器，以前称为 bitwarden_rs

items.title: Open-Generative-AI
items.description: Uncensored, open-source alternative to Higgsfield AI, Freepik AI, Krea AI, Openart AI — Free, unrestricted AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models (Flux, Midjourney, Kling, Sora, Veo). No content filters. Self-hosted, MIT licensed.
items.description_zh: Higgsfield AI、Freepik AI、Krea AI、Openart AI 的未经审查、开源替代方案 — 免费、不受限制的 AI 图像和视频生成工作室，拥有 200 多个模型（Flux、Midjourney、Kling、Sora、Veo）。没有内容过滤器。自托管，麻省理工学院许可。

items.title: build-your-own-x
items.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.
items.description_zh: 通过从头开始重新创建您最喜欢的技术来掌握编程。

items.title: DeepEP
items.description: DeepEP: an efficient expert-parallel communication library
items.description_zh: DeepEP：高效的专家并行通信库

items.title: typescript-go
items.description: Staging repo for development of native port of TypeScript
items.description_zh: 用于开发 TypeScript 本机端口的临时存储库
